title: stc pay - Payment API Security Review
description: Test payment authorization and account-linking APIs for broken access control and business-logic flaws.

title: SDAIA Open Data Portal - Web Application Assessment
description: Public-facing open-data portal accepting responsible disclosure of standard OWASP Top 10 web vulnerabilities.

title: KFUPM Cyber Security Club - Monthly Jeopardy CTF (Web Track)
description: Student-run jeopardy-style CTF focused on classic web exploitation challenges. Great first target for new hunters.

title: National Cyber Initiative - Critical Infrastructure Adjacent Systems
description: Advanced-track program covering infrastructure-adjacent systems. Recommended only after building a verified bounty track record.

title: ShiftZero CyberSimulation - Red Team Range
description: A simulated corporate network range for practicing full attack-chain red-team exercises, from initial recon through lateral movement, in a safe, legal, gamified environment.
